]

]

// C11: Enablers
instance CalibrationEnabler_CarModels : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm continuously updating model parameters based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService_ModelExecution
]

instance MonitoringEnabler_PerformanceCheck : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service monitoring real-time performance by comparing simulated states against actual data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService_RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler_AnomalyAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler_SafetyConstraints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance StateEstimationEnabler_StateInference : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService_SensorFusion
]

instance OptimisationEnabler_PerformanceOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

// C6: Services
instance SimulationService_ModelExecution : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceMetricInsight

]

instance MonitoringService_RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance FaultDetectionService_AnomalyAlert : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance SupervisoryControlService_SafetyOrchestration : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance StateEstimationService_SensorFusion : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service providing inferred unmeasured states from sensor data"
]

instance OptimisationService_PerformanceAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service computing adjustments to improve performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimisationRecommendationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimisationApplyAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance CalibrationConfidenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model parameter confidence derived from calibration aligning with sensor data"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "An anomaly detected in sensor streams"
]

instance SafeOperatingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle is operating within safe and optimal bounds based on model predictions"
]

instance PerformanceMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time comparison of simulated states against actual sensor data, generating performance metrics"
]

instance ViolationDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected violation of safety constraints by the vehicle"
]

instance OptimisationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithm recommends an operating point adjustment"
]

// C17: Actions
instance HumanReviewAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human reviewer investigates detected anomaly"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AutonomousBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic braking action applied to correct a detected safety violation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AutonomousThrottleAdjustAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic throttle adjustment applied to improve performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimisationApplyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Apply optimizer’s recommended operating point adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Lifecycle stages include: 1) Conceptual modelling of system aspects such as geometry (CAD) and physics (differential equations); 2) Concrete modelling of cyber‑physical interactions and environment dynamics; 3) Integration of models and time‑series data acquired from PT sensors into a Digital Twin framework; 4) Calibration, where algorithms update model parameters to reconcile the DT with PT; 5) Monitoring, where DT‑hosted monitors assess safety and performance and detect violations; 6) Optimization/control, where fault detectors, supervisory controllers, state estimators, or optimisers generate decision data; 7) Evolution, where detected violations trigger human or algorithmic modifications to the PT and corresponding updates to the DT; governance hinges on continuous feedback loops and parameter re‑calibration, but formal lifecycle governance is not explicitly described."
]
